one_liner: GoHighLevel offers a broad REST API (V2) with Private Integration Token and OAuth 2.0 auth, self-serve via trial/paid plans, and an official HTTP-based MCP server, making it buildable now with minor caveats around subscription tiers and MCP transport compatibility.

auth_methods.notes: Private Integration Tokens (PIT) for internal tools/single-account use, passed as Bearer token in Authorization header.
OAuth 2.0 with PKCE for public Marketplace apps, supports Location-level and Agency-level access.

self_serve_notes: No free tier for platform subscription; 14-day free trial available. API access gated by subscription tier ($297/mo Unlimited for basic API, $497/mo Agency Pro for advanced API). Private Integration Tokens can be self-generated within an active paid/trial account. Marketplace app listing is free for developers, requiring an active agency subscription to build/test.

api_surface.notes: GoHighLevel V2 API covers CRM, calendars, contacts, opportunities, marketing, conversations, etc. Official SDKs for TypeScript, Python, PHP. V1 API deprecated.

main_blocker: Requires an active paid (or trial) GoHighLevel agency subscription to generate Private Integration Tokens or register OAuth Marketplace apps; official MCP server is HTTP-based only, requiring community bridges for stdio-based clients like Claude Desktop.

evidence.supports: V2 API auth paths: Private Integration Tokens for internal tools, OAuth 2.0 for Marketplace apps.
OAuth 2.0 with PKCE flow, Location and Agency level access for Marketplace apps.
Official TypeScript SDK supporting Private Integration Token initialization.
No free tier; 14-day trial; API access gated by $297/mo and $497/mo plans.

flags: Official MCP server is HTTP-based; stdio-based clients need community bridge servers
No free tier for platform access; requires paid subscription or trial
V1 API deprecated, must use V2
